title: Check why ASR model passed text-only filter

log.context: Check why ASR model passed text-only filter

Pattern works correctly. The changes are solid. Here's what was found and fixed:

---

**Root cause — two independent failures that compounded:**

1. **The trending API doesn't include `pipeline_tag`**. `_normalize_hf_models()` builds candidate dicts from the trending endpoint, which doesn't return `pipeline_tag`. So when `filter_candidates` / `_is_text_only()` ran, the candidate had `pipeline_tag = None`. The filter's first (most reliable) check is a no-op.

2. **"transcribe" wasn't in the name...(truncated)
